data.content:
Shipment complete. Fast-forward merged `origin/codex/363f-beat-overview-columns` into `/Users/cartine/foolery` main and pushed `HEAD:main` to `origin/main`. Final shipped commit is `9f4dc40701685f7426ddc82e06483dfa12c54e00`; local `main` and `origin/main` both resolve to that commit.

Remote CI on main:
- CI run `25307803513`: completed success. It emitted warning annotations for existing coverage regression thresholds, but the workflow passed.
- Coverage Badge run `25307803528`: completed success.

Note: the post-merge hook printed `error: sync error: 1 active lease(s) found; terminate leases before syncing`; the git fast-forward merge and push both succeeded.
